level_signals: 5+ years of product management experience required
First dedicated PM for Duet — founding/senior scope
Comp range $232K–$290K base consistent with Senior IC at a well-funded AI startup
Owns roadmap end-to-end, owns customer relationships, participates in sales demos

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5+ years of product management experience at a company building AI, developer tooling, or enterprise software — you've owned a meaningful surface area and shipped things real customers depend on
must_haves.qualifier: at a company building AI, developer tooling, or enterprise software

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Technical acumen — you can read an agent trace, engage meaningfully with engineers on model behavior, and form your own opinions about whether an AI output is good or not
Strong written communication — specs, strategy docs, and async updates that don't require follow-up questions
Customer instincts — you know how to run discovery without leading the witness, and you can tell the difference between what customers say they want and what they actually need
Comfort navigating ambiguity and a track record of making good decisions with incomplete information

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience shipping AI-powered features or working with LLMs in a product context is a strong plus
A Computer Science, Engineering, or Math degree or equivalent technical experience.
Previous startup or high-growth company experience.
Experience with building prototypes and 0-to-1 products

scope.surface: Duet — AI-powered agent lifecycle improvement product; analyzes production conversations, identifies gaps, generates and validates AOP updates, and automates self-testing with human approval gates
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise SaaS, conversational AI platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Compression of iteration cycle for customers (days to minutes)
Quality of Duet AI output (evaluation criteria)
core_responsibilities: Own the Duet product roadmap from discovery through delivery
Spend meaningful time with customers to understand how they use Duet
Partner with engineering and research team to ship and validate quickly
Develop evaluation criteria for Duet's AI output quality
Work with GTM to translate Duet's capabilities into proof points that land with heads of CX and technical buyers — join customer calls and sales demos
Define the metrics that matter: not just adoption, but whether Duet is actually making agents better over time and compressing the iteration cycle for customers

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed and competitive ($232K–$290K base + equity)
First dedicated PM for Duet — high ownership, high impact, founding-level opportunity
Clear product surface with articulated problem space (agent lifecycle improvement)
Well-funded company (a16z, Accel, Bain Capital Ventures, Coatue, Index Ventures)
Strong enterprise customer roster (Cash App, Square, Chime, Oura Health, Avis Budget Group)
red_flags: Fully in-office requirement with no remote option; specific office location(s) not named in JD
No visa sponsorship or work authorization information provided
Role scope is broad (roadmap, customer relationships, sales demos, GTM, AI evaluation) — may indicate resource constraints or high expectations for a single PM
JD does not specify office location city, making it difficult to assess commute feasibility

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and 'founding PM' framing)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and customer list)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not listed explicitly in JD)

ambiguities: Office location city is never named; JD says 'We're an in-office company' but does not specify which city/cities are relevant to this role.

The JD mentions UK employees receive 25 days statutory leave, suggesting potential international hiring, but the role description and compensation (USD) suggest US-primary; work authorization requirements are unstated.
